hero.title: Detect deepfakes before they spread.
hero.subtitle: Upload an image, video, or audio file and get instant AI-powered deepfake detection with a confidence score.
hero.helper: No credit card required. All analyses run in a secure, isolated environment.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three steps to know if your media is authentic.
how.step1Body: Drag and drop or browse to select an image, video, or audio clip up to 200 MB.
how.step2Body: Our model scans the file in seconds, looking for manipulation artifacts.
how.step3Body: Receive a clear verdict — Authentic, Manipulated, or Inconclusive — with a confidence score.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: MediaGuard gives you the tools to verify any media file, fast.
features.f1Body: Analyze all major media formats in one place — JPEG, MP4, MP3, and more.
features.f2Body: State-of-the-art deep learning detects subtle manipulation patterns invisible to the eye.
features.f3Body: Every result comes with a percentage score so you always know how certain the verdict is.
features.f4Body: Files are processed in an isolated environment and never shared with third parties.
features.f5Body: All your past detections are saved so you can revisit and compare results any time.
features.f6Body: Most files are analyzed in under 30 seconds, so you never have to wait long.

usecases.label: Who it's for
usecases.title: Built for those who can't afford to be wrong.
usecases.subtitle: Whether you're breaking news or reviewing evidence, MediaGuard gives you the confidence to act.
usecases.uc1Body: Verify the authenticity of media before publishing. Protect your reputation and your readers from synthetic misinformation.
usecases.uc1b1: Instant verdict on images and videos
usecases.uc2Body: Identify AI-generated or manipulated content at scale. Keep your platform trustworthy for every user.
usecases.uc3Body: Validate digital evidence with a verifiable confidence score. Use MediaGuard findings to support investigations.

cta.title: Start protecting yourself from deepfakes.
cta.subtitle: Join MediaGuard today — it's free to get started.
